finding: conversation.created unconditionally sets recentConversations = conversations.slice(0,20) while conversations is the server-filtered/sorted set; creating a conversation during an active search/non-recent sort pollutes the sidebar recent widget.

conversation.created unshifts the new conversation into the (possibly filtered) list and increments total, so a non-matching new conversation appears in search results and inflates the filtered total/hasMore.

setSearchQuery/setSort call loadConversations(1) which early-returns while a load is in flight, so a query/sort change during an in-flight load is dropped with no trailing refetch, leaving stale results.
Search term is concatenated into ILIKE '%'||$4||'%' without escaping LIKE metacharacters, so '%'/'_' act as wildcards and diverge from the client-side plain-substring find.
Same unescaped LIKE metacharacters (%/_) in the bound search term let a term like '50%' behave as a wildcard match (functional/semantic bug; parameter binding still prevents SQL injection).
messageText(message) and the collapse decision recompute on every render, and every ChatMessage consumes ConversationFindContext so all messages re-render on each find Next/Prev step.
The collapsed bottom fade uses a to-background color gradient, but a long user message sits on a bg-primary/10 bubble, so the fade shows a visible mismatched band instead of blending.
Closing the find bar (Esc/close) unmounts it while focus is on its input, dropping focus to <body> instead of restoring it to the find-toggle button.
The Show more/less toggle sets aria-expanded but has no aria-controls and the content region has no id, so AT cannot associate the toggle with the region it controls.
The too-large paste toast interpolates ${f.name || ''}, producing a double space ("Pasted image  is too large.") when a pasted screenshot has no filename.

Leading-wildcard ILIKE over message_contents cannot use a btree index and runs in both list + count queries; ACCEPTED per DEC-3 (per-user data bounded; trigram/FTS is a documented future optimization).

Cmd/Ctrl-F is intercepted app-wide while the conversation page is mounted, overriding native browser find; ACCEPTED per DEC-5 (the feature deliberately replaces native find with a conversation-wide find covering the same rendered content).
Reviewed: localStorage access is try/catch guarded and degrades to no-op; upload/search error paths surface toasts and reset loading; no unhandled rejection found.
Reviewed: the list endpoint retains RequirePermissions<(ConversationsRead,)> and owner-scoping; search/sort add no new data exposure; paste-image respects FilesUpload; no authz gap found.
Reviewed: search/sort are optional #[serde(default)] params (backward-compatible); response shape unchanged; OpenAPI + TS regenerated in lockstep; store sends only non-empty params.

Reviewed: integration tests seed real DB rows and assert content-vs-title matching + filtered totals against the real endpoint; e2e drives real UI + server-side search; unit tests cover pure helpers; no cosmetic/over-mocked assertions found.
